The '''quenker''' was a small [[Armor/Legends|armored]] hopping [[Rodent/Legends|rodent]] which lived on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. Its jaws secreted an [[Acid/Legends|acidic]] bile used for eating and digesting its victims' flesh.

Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the collector [[Jener Mich]] tasked a group of spacers to hunt and kill an unreasonable number of quenkers.<ref name="SWG:QotQ">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Queller of the Quenker}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Quenkers appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
